facts_and_diagnostics.fact_note: Only current-frontier facts are shown here; the full proof context artifact keeps the compiler/internal details.

notes.message: Every surfaced bridge option was accepted by the daemon against the current goal. Direct byequiv remains a risky fallback, not the preferred route.
Some imported or cross-scope handles may need lookup if that route is being tested; use lookup_candidates for the concrete symbol instead of treating the whole list as a to-do queue.
